settings.text: We will work quickly to ship your order as soon as possible. Once your order has shipped, you will receive an email with further information. Delivery times vary depending on your location.
Our goal is for every customer to be totally satisfied with their purchase. If this isn't the case, let us know and we'll do our best to work with you to make it right.
We offer exchanges within 30 days of delivery. Items must be unworn, unwashed, and in their original condition with all tags attached. Contact our support team to initiate an exchange.

We ship to most countries worldwide. International orders typically take 7–14 business days for delivery. Please note that import duties and taxes may apply and are the responsibility of the recipient.
Discover our curated palette — four signature colorways designed to complement every moment, every mood, every you.
A deep, romantic hue that transitions seamlessly from day to evening.
Cool and calming tones inspired by coastal mornings and gentle waves.
Warm amber tones that capture the magic of sunset in every piece.
Crisp and refined, a cool palette that makes a bold, modern statement.

settings.text: Founded with a mission to deliver quality products to customers everywhere.
Expanded our product line and reached customers in over 30 countries.
Launched our sustainability initiative and committed to carbon-neutral shipping.
Made with care and unconditionally loved by our customers, this signature bestseller exceeds all expectations.
Crafted from premium borosilicate glass, this pitcher combines elegant form with everyday function. Its clean lines and generous silhouette make it a striking addition to any table setting.
Heat-resistant and dishwasher safe, this pitcher is designed for daily use. From cold brew to lemonade, it handles everything with grace and durability you can count on.
